action.reasoning: Observation: Exit code 139 (SIGSEGV) after only 6 seconds - the process crashes immediately, likely during import of torch_geometric or data loading. Previous iteration also crashed with 139 but took 502s (possibly OOM during pos_weight computation with torch.stack on 350K tensors). The train.py was also truncated. Analysis: Need to first diagnose if torch_geometric works at all, then fix the training pipeline. The torch.stack on 350K label tensors might also be memory-intensive. Decision: Write a diagnostic script to test imports and data loading step by step, then fix the full pipeline based on results.
